calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Lorraine Breaux. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Williams is present.
Attorney Sebastian Kaplan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.
This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
